SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

Class ElfProgBits

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection
net.boricj.bft.elf.sections.ElfProgBits
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable, Writable
public class ElfProgBits extends ElfSection
ELF section containing raw byte data (SHT_PROGBITS). Represents sections with initialized data such as code (.text) or data (.data) segments.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfSection

    SHN_ABS, SHN_COMMON, SHN_LORESERVE, SHN_UNDEF, SHN_XINDEX

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties.
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties and entry size.
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with complete properties for file layout.
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize)
    Parses a PROGBITS section from an ELF file.

  • Constructor Details

    • ElfProgBits

      public ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, byte[] bytes)
      Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - the section name
      flags - the section flags
      addralign - the address alignment
      bytes - the section content

    • ElfProgBits

      public ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
      Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties and entry size.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - the section name
      flags - the section flags
      addralign - the address alignment
      entsize - the entry size for fixed-size elements
      bytes - the section content

    • ElfProgBits

      public ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
      Creates a PROGBITS section with complete properties for file layout.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      name - the section name
      flags - the section flags
      addr - the virtual address
      offset - the file offset
      addralign - the address alignment
      entsize - the entry size for fixed-size elements
      bytes - the section content

    • ElfProgBits

      public ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize) throws IOException
      Parses a PROGBITS section from an ELF file.
      Parameters:
      elf - the parent ELF file
      parser - the ELF parser
      flags - the section flags
      addr - the virtual address
      offset - the file offset
      size - the section size
      link - the link index
      info - additional information
      addralign - the address alignment
      entsize - the entry size for fixed-size elements
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails
